disclaimer: Festival dates and lineups can shift year to year; always confirm official event pages.

festivals.name: Louisiana Sugar Cane Festival
festivals.description: Historic celebration of the region's sugar heritage with parade and royalty events.
festivals.tips: Best parade viewing is along Main Street early.

festivals.name: Cinema on the Bayou
festivals.description: International film festival focused on Francophone and Louisiana stories.
festivals.tips: Buy a pass for multiple screenings.

festivals.name: Carencro Mardi Gras Fair
festivals.description: Family-friendly carnival with rides, bands, and local food booths.
festivals.tips: Bring cash for booths.

festivals.name: Courir de Mardi Gras (Rural Runs)
festivals.description: Traditional Cajun Mardi Gras runs with costumes, music, and gumbo traditions.
festivals.tips: Arrive before sunrise for best viewing.

festivals.name: Youngsville Mardi Gras Parade
festivals.description: Suburban Mardi Gras parade with family krewe floats.
festivals.tips: Bring chairs and beads bags for kids.

festivals.name: International Cajun-Zydeco Festival
festivals.description: Weekend festival spotlighting Cajun and zydeco bands and dance workshops.
festivals.tips: Wear comfortable dance shoes.

festivals.name: Lafayette St. Patrick's Parade & Festival
festivals.description: St. Paddy parade with green-themed block party downtown.
festivals.tips: Parking fills up quickly downtown.

festivals.name: Festival International de Louisiane
festivals.description: World-famous free international arts festival taking over downtown for five days.
festivals.tips: Bring refillable water bottle and sun hat.

festivals.name: Breaux Bridge Crawfish Festival
festivals.description: Legendary crawfish celebration with races, cook-offs, and dancing.
festivals.tips: Go early for crawfish eating contest seats.

festivals.name: Downtown Alive! (Spring Series)
festivals.description: Weekly outdoor concert series in the heart of downtown.
festivals.tips: Bring lawn chairs and support local vendors.

festivals.name: Rhythms on the River (Spring)
festivals.description: Open-air neighborhood concert series with picnic vibe.
festivals.tips: Blankets are better than chairs for packed nights.

festivals.name: El Festival Español de Nueva Iberia
festivals.description: Celebration of Spanish heritage with dancing and cultural exhibits.
festivals.tips: Great event for family cultural activities.

festivals.name: Rayne Frog Festival
festivals.description: Small-town festival honoring Rayne's frog capital heritage.
festivals.tips: Try frog legs early before lines build.

festivals.name: Scott Boudin Festival
festivals.description: Boudin Capital festival with cook-offs and carnival atmosphere.
festivals.tips: Vote in the people's choice tastings.

festivals.name: Erath Fourth of July Festival
festivals.description: Classic small-town Independence Day celebration with parade and fireworks.
festivals.tips: Stay for evening fireworks finale.

festivals.name: Uncle Sam's Jam
festivals.description: Lafayette's Independence celebration with live music and fireworks.
festivals.tips: Arrive early for parking near Parc International.

festivals.name: Acadiana Dragon Boat Festival
festivals.description: Charity dragon boat races with all-day entertainment.
festivals.tips: Bring sunscreen; little shade on race route.

festivals.name: Delcambre Shrimp Festival
festivals.description: Working waterfront shrimp industry celebration.
festivals.tips: Seafood plates sell out by evening.

festivals.name: International Rice Festival
festivals.description: One of Louisiana's oldest agricultural festivals celebrating rice country.
festivals.tips: Parade day draws biggest crowd.

festivals.name: Festivals Acadiens et Créoles
festivals.description: Major cultural festival preserving Cajun and Creole music, food, and crafts.
festivals.tips: Sunday mornings are great for dance workshops.

festivals.name: Blackpot Festival & Cookoff
festivals.description: Roots music and camp-style cookoff with intimate vibe.
festivals.tips: Bring a camping chair and stay for late sets.

festivals.name: Downtown Alive! (Fall Series)
festivals.description: Seasonal return of the iconic downtown concert series.
festivals.tips: Follow social channels for weather updates.

festivals.name: Rhythms on the River (Fall)
festivals.description: Community concert nights with mixed-genre lineups.
festivals.tips: Bring bug spray at dusk.

festivals.name: Broussard Boudin Cook-Off
festivals.description: Competitive boudin tasting event with live local bands.
festivals.tips: Buy tasting wristbands in advance.

festivals.name: Acadian Village Noel Celebration
festivals.description: Historic village transformed into holiday light experience.
festivals.tips: Weeknights have shorter lines.

festivals.name: Cajun Heartland State Fair
festivals.description: Major fair with rides, concerts, and carnival food.
festivals.food: Turkey legs, funnel cake, boudin balls
festivals.tips: Check ride wristband nights for best value.

festivals.name: Geaux Teche Festival
festivals.description: Paddle, music, and ecology festival celebrating Bayou Teche.
festivals.tips: Book paddle tours ahead.

festivals.name: St. Landry BBQ Festival
festivals.description: Regional barbecue festival with cook teams and live music.
festivals.tips: Bring folding chair for evening sets.

festivals.name: World Championship Gumbo Cookoff
festivals.description: Competitive gumbo event attracting teams from across Louisiana.
festivals.tips: Tasting line starts early.

festivals.name: Louisiana Seafood & Heritage Festival
festivals.description: Celebrates Gulf seafood with chef demos and family zones.
festivals.tips: Attend chef demo tents before dinner rush.

festivals.name: St. John's Fall Fair
festivals.description: Parish fair with carnival rides and local performances.
festivals.tips: Great for families with younger kids.

festivals.name: Allons à Lafayette
festivals.description: Francophone culture weekend with talks, food, and music.
festivals.tips: Reserve symposium tickets early.

festivals.name: Fête de la Musique Lafayette
festivals.description: Free citywide music day inspired by the French tradition.
festivals.tips: Walk between stages for variety.

festivals.name: Bastille Day Fête
festivals.description: Francophone celebration with wine, music, and French-Cajun food.
festivals.tips: Dress for heat if outdoors.

festivals.name: Acadiana Holiday Art Market
festivals.description: Annual holiday shopping festival featuring regional artists.
festivals.tips: Morning hours are least crowded.

festivals.name: Noël Acadien au Village
festivals.description: Beloved Christmas lights event at Acadian Village.
festivals.tips: Bring jackets for night breeze.

festivals.name: Eunice Mardi Gras Experience Weekend
festivals.description: Cultural immersion weekend tied to Eunice's Mardi Gras run traditions.
festivals.tips: Book lodging early in Eunice.
